narrative:
Westerville 2-E (precinct in Franklin County) has 840 registered voters, with 42.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.0%, a modest Republican lean of 3.5 percentage points.
